title: Andrewsia
taxonomy: Andrewsia is a genus of flowering plants in the family Celastraceae. The genus is named after the Scottish botanist John Andrews. Andrewsia is native to tropical regions of Africa and Asia. It consists of several species, including Andrewsia madagascariensis and Andrewsia rostrata. The classification of Andrewsia is part of the broader taxonomy of the Celastraceae family.
